text_copy.text: Breakthroughs start with seeing the person — not just "the patient." Discover true stories that celebrate people beyond their condition.

video_copy_copy_copy.description: Meet the people inspiring the medicines we make

teaser_copy_copy_901.jcr:description: Across immunology, neuroscience, oncology and beyond, real stories inspire us to make progress and push what's possible.
teaser_copy_copy_901.jcr:title: Stories of Passion and Possibility

text.text: Sunny dreamed of being a dancer until Crohn's forced her to rethink the future she imagined. Living with Crohn's has shaped her — but it doesn't define her. From nursing to podcasting to jewelry-making, Crohn's is just one part of Sunny's story.

video_copy_copy_copy.description: See how Sunny is showing up for herself — and others

text_copy.text: At 57, Steve never expected a Parkinson's diagnosis to become part of his story. There was shock and worry at first, but one thing was clear: Steve wouldn't let Parkinson's define him. With the support of his community, see how Steve leaned into life with renewed energy through boxing, DJing, learning German and more.

video.description: See how Steve is embracing a full life with Parkinson's
video.descriptiveIframeTitle: See how Steve is embracing a full life with Parkinson's

text.text: When Tami was diagnosed with stage 3 ovarian cancer, she decided her disease wouldn't become her identity. From day trips to jigsaw puzzles to support groups, Tami said yes to new adventures and chose to define her days — and herself — on her own terms.

video_copy_copy_copy_1465869041.description: See how Tami is defining life for herself

quote_copy.quote: As scientists, patient stories remind us why we're developing medicines and motivate us to keep innovating.

teaser.jcr:description: In 2025, our medicines and solutions reached 74 million patients worldwide. Explore the programs we offer to help people access their prescribed medicines.
teaser.jcr:title:
Navigating Access.
Supporting People.

quote_copy_copy.quote: We know we've made an impact when patients have access to the medicines and resources they need.

text.text: Our programs educate, empower and support patients throughout their journey.
We're helping patients get their prescribed medicines through our innovative patient programs.
Our programs educate, empower and support patients throughout their journey.
We're helping patients get their prescribed medicines through our innovative patient programs.
Our programs educate, empower and support patients throughout their journey.
We're helping patients get their prescribed medicines through our innovative patient programs.

teaser_1398387824.jcr:description: We're working every day to turn science into meaningful progress for patients. Learn how our people are shaping what's next in medicine.
teaser_1398387824.jcr:title: Innovation inspired by people

video_copy_copy_copy.description: Discover how we're tackling some of the toughest challenges in medicine

title.jcr:title: See more of the science driving our innovation.
